action: Cast Bane on all three ghouls
weapon_or_spell: Bane (1st-level, concentration, WIS save DC 13, -1d4 to attacks and saves for 1 min)
notes: Bane reduces ghoul attack rolls and saving throws by 1d4 each. Critical against paralysis threat. Contingency: if Sable is hurt, use Healing Word as bonus action and hold Bane as action.
